action: Set correct selling price. Items cannot be invoiced at zero.

check: Zero cost price (cost_price = 0, sell price set)
action: Enter actual cost price. Required for accurate P&L and margin reports.
Investigate: likely missing purchase records or opening stock not entered.
Review reorder levels and raise purchase orders.
Assign a category. Required for stock reports and product filtering.
Each product must have a unique SKU. Merge duplicates or assign new codes.
Barcode must uniquely identify one product. Remove or correct duplicate barcodes.
Review each pair — merge if same product, rename if different.

check: In-stock products with no sales in last 12 months (slow-moving)
action: Review for write-down, return to supplier, or promotion.
Add at least one contact method for invoicing, statements, and overdue chasing.

check: B2B customers missing VAT registration number
action: Obtain VAT number for tax invoice compliance. Required for VAT audit.

check: B2B customers missing CR (Commercial Registration) number
action: CR number helps with deduplication and formal identification.

check: Duplicate VAT numbers (likely same company entered twice)
action: Same VAT number = same legal entity. Merge the duplicate records.

check: Duplicate CR numbers (likely same company entered twice)
action: Same CR = same legal entity. Merge the duplicate records.
Confirm these are real customers. Deactivate if not needed.
Verify each pair. If same company: merge, reassign invoices, delete one.

check: B2B customers with open AR balance but credit limit = 0
action: Set credit limits to manage exposure and trigger alerts.
Add contact info for purchase orders and payment remittances.
Required on purchase invoices for input VAT reclaim.
Confirm these are active suppliers. Deactivate or delete if not needed.

check: Suppliers with open AP balance but no VAT number
action: High priority — obtain VAT numbers for outstanding AP suppliers before filing.

check: Duplicate VAT numbers (likely same supplier entered twice)
action: Merge duplicate supplier records and reassign all purchases to the retained record.
Verify each pair. If same supplier: merge records, reassign purchases.
Monitor supplier dependency; diversify if top supplier > 30% of AP.
